title: Arsenal and Anvil
description: A small QoL mod aimed to add a variety of new weapons and tools for all tiers.
body:
Arsenal and Anvil is a small QoL mod aimed to add a variety of new weapons and tools for all tiers!

All items can be crafted like you normally would in vanilla, with a helpful guide to start you off.

Fight with weapons ranging from katanas to glaives, mine with paxels and hammers, or farm with sickles!

## Features
- 12 new weapons grouped by **fast**, **heavy**, and **polearm**
- Hammer which mines a 3x3 area of blocks in the direction you're mining
- Paxel which functions as a pickaxe, axe, and shovel in one
- Sickle which harvests a 3x3 area of crops, with a small chance to yield extra crops

![](https://github.com/junyali/arsenalandanvil/blob/main/preview/demo_1.png?raw=true)

## Dependencies
- Apothic Attributes 2.8.1 or later
- Placebo 9.8.1 or later
- Curios 9.3.1 or later
- Patchouli 1.21-88 or later
